fields.acceptance_criteria: Dioxus/WASM client compiles to wasm32 and mirrors TUI control set + session semantics; consumes websocket lifecycle+output; a session started in the TUI is observable/controllable from the browser (parity).
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH8] Dioxus/WASM minimal interface parity
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check -p agent-web --target wasm32-unknown-unknown. Primary: cargo test (shared logic) + Playwright smoke. Manual: external Chromium browser at documented resolution + screenshots (live stream, mode toggle). Failure logs: target/test-logs/ + Playwright artifacts.
